ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the training program */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the training program */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the training program */,
  "duration_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in hours */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the training program (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Alabama, Alaska, etc.) */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated state code (e.g., AL, AK, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city belongs to */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* City code or zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the target group (e.g., General, Veterans, etc.) */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the target group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_states" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_cities" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_target_groups" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, trainer, trainee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the user completed the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, trainer, trainee) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

Detailed description of the training program
Duration of the training program in hours
Format of the training program (e.g., online, in-person)

Reference to the state the city belongs to

Name of the target group (e.g., General, Veterans, etc.)
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, trainer, trainee)
